hotel.name: LUMIÈRE
hotel.description: Where culinary artistry meets the future of dining. Scan. Discover. Experience.

dishes.name: Paneer Tikka
dishes.description: Smoky charcoal-grilled cottage cheese cubes marinated in yogurt, saffron, and house spices. Served with mint chutney and pickled onions.

dishes.name: Butter Chicken
dishes.description: Slow-simmered free-range chicken in a velvety tomato-cashew gravy with aged butter and fenugreek. A timeless classic elevated.

dishes.name: Dal Makhani
dishes.description: Black lentils slow-cooked overnight on a charcoal flame, finished with cream and a whisper of smoked butter.

dishes.name: Gulab Jamun
dishes.description: Soft milk-solid dumplings soaked in cardamom-rose syrup, served warm with vanilla kulfi.

dishes.name: Mango Lassi
dishes.description: Chilled Alphonso mango blended with strained yogurt, saffron, and a hint of cardamom. Topped with pistachio dust.

dishes.name: Seekh Kebab
dishes.description: Minced lamb and herb rolls grilled on iron skewers over live coals. Served with charred peppers and saffron aioli.

dishes.name: Rasmalai
dishes.description: Chilled cottage cheese rounds soaked in condensed milk, perfumed with rose water, pistachios, and silver leaf.

dishes.name: Virgin Mojito
dishes.description: Fresh lime, muddled mint, raw cane sugar, and sparkling water. Light, refreshing, and endlessly elegant.
